title: FormatUrl — standard (http/ftp/ws schemes)
description: FormatUrl (format `url`, `maxLength` 2048); accepts common schemes (http, ftp, ws/wss)
notes: Rejected: a scheme-less string (`not-a-url`), a bare host (`example.com`), a `mailto:` URI, and a scheme with no host (`https://`). The format error is `{name: url}` (no `val`).
